hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start by storing the shot length: let shotLength = getShotLength()

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Set a variable x to 29 to track the ball's position

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a loop that runs shotLength + 1 times

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Inside the loop, increase x by 1 and call rollTo(x)

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Don't forget to fire the fireworks at the end!
